svg.title: UML Class Diagram — Server
svg.desc: Server-side classes: GameServer, WebSocketServer, GameServerHandler, MatchManager, MatchSession, LobbyService, AuthRegistry, SessionRegistry, ClientSession, BotController, ChatRouter, ProfanityFilter.
svg.text: Netty edge · session registry · match orchestration · chat · bots
ScheduledExecutorService inside MatchManager · fires at 20 Hz · drains all MatchSession.tick(dt) inside one worker pool.
Backpressure: if a tick is > 50 ms, the next tick is skipped and a warning is logged. BotController.stepTick() and ClientSession.send() run on the same loop.
Hot path is allocation-free: snapshots are produced into pooled buffers; WireCodec serialises into Netty ByteBufs.
Stateless across pods — match-id is sticky at the load balancer.
pink = runtime · amber = persistence · gold dashed = interface boundary
